# Explain My Error

> AI-powered debugging assistant for developers. Paste any programming error, terminal log, or code snippet and get an instant explanation, root cause, and fix across 120+ languages.

Explain My Error helps developers debug smarter, not harder. It accepts text errors, terminal output, source code, and screenshots (via OCR), auto-detects the language and framework, and produces structured bug reports with explanations, suggested fixes, and follow-up chat. Free users get 10 queries before sign-in.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Main debugger — paste errors, code, terminal output, or images and get AI explanations and fixes.
